whatMustBeOnSite: Current hood-system or suppression service report.
Visible service tags or stickers that match the latest report.
Portable fire extinguisher service current within the previous 12 months.
Clear means of egress and proper clearance at electrical panels.
commonFailureReasons: Blocked egress or storage in the exit path.
Portable extinguishers not current or not mounted correctly.
Fire protection systems not maintained in working order.
rescheduleMethod: Use Austin Fire's inspection scheduling process by phone or online request rather than waiting for the next visit window.
penaltyOrEscalation: If required reports are missing, Austin Fire can treat the site as not inspection-ready and require follow-up before final compliance.
